title: Parity: senml (Rust/Zephyr/Python)
description: Policy: three-impl parity. Module: senml. Rust: complete (763 LoC). Zephyr: complete (602 LoC). Python: complete (349 LoC). Gap: none - full parity across all three implementations.
close_reason: Verified compliant: All 3 implementations (Rust 926 LoC, Python 349 LoC, Zephyr C 602 LoC) encode RFC 8428 SenML-CBOR with shared core fields (bn, bt, n, u, v, vb, t). Tests pass (Rust 22/22, Python 20/20). Cross-validated: Python decodes C float32 output correctly. Intentional platform-appropriate differences: C encodes-only (no decode), uses float32; Python has extended fields (vd, s, ut). Wire-format interoperable.
